name: John Cornyn

contactInfo.office: 517 Hart Senate Office Building, Washington, DC 20510

bio: John Cornyn has served as U.S. Senator from Texas since 2002. Before entering the Senate, he served as Texas Attorney General and as a Justice on the Texas Supreme Court. He is a graduate of Trinity University and St. Mary's University School of Law. Cornyn has held Republican leadership positions in the Senate and focuses on border security, judicial appointments, and trade.
campaignPromises: Strengthen border security and immigration enforcement
Support Texas energy producers and oppose burdensome regulations
Confirm constitutionalist judges to federal courts
Reduce federal spending and balance the budget
